data.title: Ashley Graham partners with Breescape to promote cooling sleep products for hot sleepers. (Characters: 90)
data.description: A renowned supermodel and advocate for body positivity has teamed up with a leading sleep brand focused on cooling technology to promote all-night comfort tailored for various body types and sleep patterns. The collaboration was announced in New York on September 12, 2025. Breescape™, the bedding company known for its commitment to offering uninterrupted cooling relief for individuals experiencing hot flashes and sleep disturbances, is at the forefront of this venture.

data.title: BananaImg AI launches innovative platform merging Google's Nano Banana AI and Veo 3, providing advanced image and video capabilities.
data.description: BananaImg AI has introduced the pioneering creative platform, consolidating the most advanced image and video generation technologies worldwide. This platform marks a significant milestone in the industry, integrating a variety of innovative capabilities within a unified suite. The announcement was made in Sheridan, Wyoming, on September 12, 2025. BananaImg AI's platform stands out as the initial service to combine these cutting-edge features into a single comprehensive offering.

data.title: APT212 joins forces with Compass, enhancing its boutique focus with the #1 U.S. brokerage, offering top tools and nationwide reach.
data.description: In New York on September 12, 2025, APT212, a boutique real estate brokerage located in SoHo and known for luxury condo sales and investment properties, has announced a partnership with Compass. This collaboration will merge APT212's specialized boutique approach with Compass's platform, enhancing their services. The partnership aims to leverage APT212's expertise in luxury real estate with Compass's broader reach, benefiting both firms.

data.title: WMCHealth Network appoints Dr. Peter G. Paige as Chief Clinical Officer to enhance patient care across 9 hospitals.
data.description: A prominent medical leader has been chosen to oversee clinical excellence, quality, and patient safety throughout the nine-hospital network of WMCHealth. The newly established Chief Clinical Officer position aims to establish WMCHealth as a benchmark for contemporary academic healthcare. The appointment was made in Valhalla, New York on September 12, 2025.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. responds to shareholder requisition by calling a meeting, as requested by CDS & Co. representing TFG Asset Management UK LLP.
data.description: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. based in Thousand Oaks, California, has disclosed that its Board of Directors received a requisition under section 167 of the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia) from CDS & Co. representing certain participants. These participants hold common shares on behalf of TFG Asset Management UK LLP, the beneficial owner of the shares. Kolibri is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: KEI) and the NASDAQ (KGEI).

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets.com introduces "Middle East and Africa Renewable Energy Policy Handbook 2025" report covering policies of 15 countries in the region.
data.description: A new report titled "Middle East and Africa Renewable Energy Policy Handbook 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. This report, focusing on 15 major countries in the region, provides detailed insights into the renewable energy policies of Algeria, Angola, Egypt, Ghana, Iran, Israel, Kenya, Kuwait, Morocco, Nigeria, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and South Africa. As per the latest industry analysis, this specialized report is designed to offer comprehensive information on the renewable energy landscape specific to the Middle East and Africa.

data.title: Thermacell Repellents selected to 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Manufacturing & Production list for the first time.
data.description: In Bedford, Massachusetts on September 12, 2025, Thermacell Repellents, Inc. was announced by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine as part of the 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Manufacturing & Production™ List. It marks Thermacell's inaugural inclusion in this esteemed list in the category of small & medium-sized enterprises.

data.title: RISE Festival announces schedule for 10th anniversary in Mojave Desert. Last chance for tickets on Oct 3–5, 2025.
data.description: The complete schedule for performances at the landmark 10th anniversary of RISE Festival has been disclosed, with the last opportunity to buy tickets being available from October 3-5, 2025. The event will take place in the Mojave Desert, Las Vegas. Interested individuals can find more information and purchase tickets at www.RISEfestival.com. This announcement was made on September 12, 2025.

data.title: Growatt showcased solar and storage innovations at RE+ 2025 in Las Vegas, on September 9–11.
data.description: From September 9 to 11, 2025, Growatt, a top supplier of distributed solar and energy storage solutions (ESS), wrapped up its involvement at RE+ 2025, the biggest clean energy event in North America, in Las Vegas. During the event, Growatt had a successful presence and engaged with a significant number of attendees.

data.title: Jackery debuts HomePower 3600 Plus at RE+ 2025, a new flagship model, alongside EHB lineup. Major event.
data.description: In Las Vegas on September 12, 2025, Jackery, a prominent company specializing in solar generators and renewable energy solutions, captivated audiences at RE+ 2025 by unveiling its latest flagship product, the HomePower 3600 Plus. This new addition to the lineup complements the full Essential Home Backup (EHB) range, demonstrating Jackery's commitment to providing comprehensive residential power solutions.

data.title: Asia-Pacific E-Commerce & Payments Market Report 2025-2028 explores B2C, B2B, Digital Payments, AI role. Data insights added.
data.description: Recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, the report titled "Asia-Pacific E-Commerce & Payments 2025" offers comprehensive insights on the region. This report delves into B2C and B2B E-Commerce, along with digital payments innovations, adoption trends, and changing dynamics. It analyzes various aspects including consumer behavior, merchant acceptance rates, and payment choices. Additionally, the report explores the regulatory framework and the impact of AI on commerce in the Asia-Pacific region.

data.title: Nonprofit Homewise receives $30K grant from FHLB Dallas to assist Street Food Institute; helps food service businesses.
data.description: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Homewise will be commemorating the allocation of a $30,000 Partnership Grant Program (PGP) grant to Street Food Institute. The celebration will take place at 9:00 a.m. (MT) on Friday, September 19, 2025, through a ceremonial check presentation. Street Food Institute, established over ten years ago, aims to assist individuals in achieving their goal of owning and managing a prosperous food service enterprise. The institute provides online classes, practical training, and support to aspiring entrepreneurs.
